name: Cocktail Crunch
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Peanut kernals (not salted or dry-roasted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the coriander and cumin lightly.
2. Mix them with the nuts and seeds on two baking trays.
3. Set the oven to 375°F (190°C) gas mark 5 and preheat it while placing the trays inside.
4. Meanwhile, measure the flaked grains and mix them together in a large bowl.
5. In a cup, combine the garam marsala, turmeric, black pepper, sea salt, soy sauce, both oils, and water.
6. When the oven reaches temperature, stir the nut and seed mixture with the flaked grains.
7. Beat the spicy oil-and-water mixture with a fork to emulsify it, then pour over the dry ingredients.
8. Stir for 2 minutes and spread the mixture evenly on the baking trays.
9. Bake for 40 minutes until golden brown, swapping tray positions at least once during cooking and stirring occasionally.
10. Allow the mixture to cool completely before storing in an airtight jar. It keeps well for about a month.
